proguard.classfile.visitor

Class ReferencedClassVisitor.KotlinReferencedClassVisitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • proguard.classfile.visitor.ReferencedClassVisitor.KotlinReferencedClassVisitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KotlinAnnotationArgumentVisitor, KotlinAnnotationVisitor, KotlinFunctionVisitor, KotlinMetadataVisitor, KotlinPropertyVisitor, KotlinTypeAliasVisitor, KotlinTypeParameterVisitor, KotlinTypeVisitor, KotlinValueParameterVisitor
    Enclosing class:
    ReferencedClassVisitor

    public static class ReferencedClassVisitor.KotlinReferencedClassVisitor
extends java.lang.Object
implements KotlinMetadataVisitor, KotlinTypeVisitor, KotlinTypeAliasVisitor, KotlinFunctionVisitor, KotlinTypeParameterVisitor, KotlinValueParameterVisitor, KotlinPropertyVisitor, KotlinAnnotationVisitor, KotlinAnnotationArgumentVisitor
